heading: Naval Observatory: administration
label: 8715 Naval Observatory: administration
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7395(note).5 U.S.C. 133y–16Reorganization Plan No. 3 of 1946, Part III, § 301, .60 Stat. 1099.5 U.S.C. 461, (2d par., last sentence).Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 85231 Stat. 1122.5 U.S.C. 463R.S. 436; , (2d par.).June 29, 1949, ch. 27863 Stat. 300In subsection (a) the words “together with their respective functions, are hereby transferred from the Bureau of Naval Personnel, Department of the Navy” are omitted as executed. The words “attached to” are substituted for the words “and shall be administered, subject to the direction and control of the Secretary of the Navy, under the Chief of Naval Operations” for brevity. All orders issued by the Chief of Naval Operations in performing the duties assigned to him are issued under the authority of the Secretary of the Navy.In subsection (b) the words “until further legislation by Congress” are omitted as surplusage.In subsection (c) the word “detail” is substituted for the word “place”. The words “in charge” are omitted as surplusage. The word “duty” is substituted for the word “service” for clarity.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7395 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.label: a
children.text: The Naval Observatory shall be attached to the Office of the Chief of Naval Operations.

children.label: b
children.text: The Superintendent of the Naval Observatory shall be detailed from officers in the line of the Navy serving in the grade of captain or above.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy may detail any officer of the Navy, competent for that duty, to supervise the Nautical Almanac.
